title: Face ID Door
description: Secure your base with a biometric scanner door! Only opens for the owner.
body:
# 🔒 Face ID Door

**Secure your base with the latest biometric technology!**

Face ID Door adds a high-tech iron door that only opens for its owner. No keys, no redstone, just you.

## ✨ Features

* **Biometric Security:** The door scans the player looking at it. If it's you, it opens automatically.
* **Ray-Traced Detection:** Uses advanced ray-casting to ensure you are looking directly at the scanner.
* **Configurable:** Customize detection range, close delay, and HUD messages via Mod Menu.
* **Smart Mechanics:** The door stays open as long as you look at it and closes automatically when you walk away.
* **Multi-Language:** Supports 30+ languages including English, Turkish, German, French, Russian, and Chinese.

## 🛠️ Dependencies

This mod requires the following to work:

**Fabric Version:**
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (Required for settings)
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional, for editing settings in-game)

**NeoForge Version:**
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

## 📸 Screenshots

![FaceID Door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1697045398764851cbf176b8b9be73d2624e60d2_0.webp)

## ⚙️ Configuration

You can adjust the following settings in the config screen:
* **Detection Range:** How far the door can see you (Default: 5 blocks).
* **Close Delay:** How long the door stays open (Default: 1 second).
* **Show Message:** Toggle the "Face ID Confirmed" action bar message.

---
*Created by Calfmolten*
